zh.Leicestershire, England, United Kingdom: 英國英格蘭萊希斯特斯爾
zh.lifeSummary: 當John Wells於1407年10月7日出生在英國斯塔福爾時，他的父親Thomas Wells27歲，母親Cecelia Ashton25歲。他於大約1426年與Alice De Aston在英國斯塔福爾結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1466年6月6日在他的家鄉享年58歲。

zh-hans.Leicestershire, England, United Kingdom: 英国英格兰萊希斯特斯爾
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John Wells于1407年10月7日出生在英国斯塔福爾时，他的父亲Thomas Wells27岁，母亲Cecelia Ashton25岁。他于大约1426年与Alice De Aston在英国斯塔福爾结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1466年6月6日在他的家乡享年58岁。

nameMeanings.name: Wells
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from Wells next the Sea (Norfolk) or Wells (Somerset), both named with the plural of Old English wella ‘spring, stream’, or a topographic name for someone who lived near a group of springs or streams.
Americanized form (translation into English) of French   Dupuis   ‘from the well’.
History: One of numerous early immigrants from England bearing this name was Thomas Welles, governor of colonial CT, who was in Hartford, CT, by 1636.

variants.name: Dupuis
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Andre, Jacques, Pierre, Armand, Cecile, Normand, Emile, Lucien, Marcel, Rosaire, Alphonse, Henri.
topographic name for someone ‘from the well’, from Old French puis ‘well’, with fused preposition and definite article du ‘from the’. Compare Dupee , Dupuie , Dupuy 2, and Wells .

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When John Wells was born on 7 October 1407, in Staffordshire, England, his father, Thomas Wells, was 27 and his mother, Cecelia Ashton, was 25. He married Alice De Aston about 1426, in Staffordshire, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. He died on 6 June 1466, in his hometown, at the age of 58.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Wells est né le 7 octobre 1407, à Staffordshire, Angleterre, son père, Thomas Wells, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Cecelia Ashton, avait 25 ans. Il a épousé Alice De Aston environ 1426, à Staffordshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé le 6 juin 1466, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 58 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als John Wells am 7. Oktober 1407 in Staffordshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Thomas Wells 27 und seine Mutter Cecelia Ashton 25. Er hat um 1426 in Staffordshire, England Alice De Aston geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 6. Juni 1466 im Alter von 58 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John Wells è nato il il 7 ottobre 1407 nel Staffordshire, England, il suo padre, Thomas Wells, aveva 27 anni e il suo madre, Cecelia Ashton, aveva 25 anni. Lui sposato Alice De Aston circa 1426, nel Staffordshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia. Morì il 6 giugno 1466, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 58 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: John Wellsが1407年10月7日にイギリススタフォードシュアイアで生まれた時，父Thomas Wellsは27歳，母Cecelia Ashtonは25歳であった。約1426年にイギリススタフォードシュアイアでAlice De Astonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1466年6月6日に故郷で58歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: John Wells(이)가 1407년 10월 7일 영국 스태퍼드실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Thomas Wells(은)는 27세였고, 그의 어머니 Cecelia Ashton(은)는 25세였다. 그는 대략 1426년 영국 스태퍼드실르에서 Alice De Aston(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1466년 6월 6일 그의 고향에서 58세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.7 October 1407–6 June 1466: 7 de outubro de 1407–6 de junho de 1466
pt.lifeSummary: Quando John Wells nasceu em 7 de outubro de 1407, em Staffordshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Thomas Wells, tinha 27 anos e sua mãe, Cecelia Ashton, tinha 25 anos. Ele casou-se com Alice De Aston aproximadamente 1426, em Staffordshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 6 de junho de 1466, em sua cidade natal, com 58 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Wells родился 7 октября 1407 г. в местности стаффордшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Thomas Wells было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Cecelia Ashton, 25. Он женился на женщине по имени Alice De Aston около 1426 г. в местности стаффордшир, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Он умер 6 июня 1466 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 58 лет.

es.7 October 1407–6 June 1466: 7 de octubre de 1407–6 de junio de 1466
es.lifeSummary: Cuando John Wells nació el 7 de octubre de 1407, en Staffordshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Thomas Wells, tenía 27 años y su mamá, Cecelia Ashton, tenía 25 años. Se casó con Alice De Aston aproximadamente 1426, en Staffordshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija. Murió el 6 de junio de 1466, en su pueblo, a la edad de 58 años.
